ddls:
CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse including supplier identifier */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse in units */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier associated with the warehouse */,
  "nation_key" INTEGER /* ID of the nation where the warehouse is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the warehouse */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Report of the last inspection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the warehouse */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_nation_key FOREIGN KEY ("nation_key") REFERENCES nations ("nation_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "nation_key" INTEGER /* ID of the nation where the supplier is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier rating based on performance metrics */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for deliveries */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nations" (
  "nation_key" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nation */,
  "nation_name" TEXT /* Name of the nation */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the nation is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the nation */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the nation */,
  "import_export_regulations" TEXT /* Summary of import/export regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nation_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product available in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for reordering the product */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned stock check */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier receiving the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the item */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the item */,
  "expected_cost" REAL /* Expected cost of the item */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order linked to this shipment */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse receiving the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was dispatched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transport (e.g., air, sea, road) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "quantity_returned" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return */,
  "actual_return_date" TEXT /* Actual date of return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
